metadata.description: Skills for writing, running, and debugging Go tests with Ginkgo — the expressive BDD testing framework, paired with Gomega.

plugins.name: ginkgo
plugins.description: Write, run, and debug Ginkgo/Gomega test suites in Go: the tree-construction mental model, the full node and decorator surface, tables and generated specs, parallelism, filtering, timeouts and async, CI configuration, and JSON-first failure diagnosis.
